# anthropic_spend_limit_increase_request (Data Source)

Fetches a single spend limit increase request by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_spend_limit_increase_request" "alice_request" {
  id = "slir_01ABC..."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `actor_email` (String)
- `actor_name` (String)
- `actor_user_id` (String)
- `amount` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `currency` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `period` (String)
- `resolved_at` (String)
- `resolved_by` (String) User email or scoped API key ID that resolved the request.
- `status` (String)
